title: Logistics Efficiency & Workforce Analysis
context: Professional analysis for X5 Digital (one of the largest grocery retail chains in the region) focusing on workforce performance and delivery network optimization.
problem: Challenges in delivery speed and logistics network scaling during peak growth periods, necessitating data-driven workforce planning and resource allocation.
actions: Structured large-scale logistics datasets using SQL and Databricks.
Identified critical bottlenecks in the contractor onboarding cycle.
Developed a centralized reporting framework to track delivery network health monthly.
myContribution: Lead data analyst for this specific workstream, responsible for building the analysis from scratch and presenting dashboards to HR Business Partners and Logistics Directors.
result: Created actionable insights that led to a 15% reduction in onboarding bottleneck time through process re-engineering and automated status tracking.

title: Startup Strategic Positioning & Funding
context: Engagement with a high-growth AI startup focused on dermatological diagnostics and computer vision technology.
problem: Lack of structured internal processes and limited visibility into the external funding landscape, preventing scalable capital fundraising.
actions: Conducted thorough market research on direct AI-health competitors in Europe and CIS.
Identified and applied for several early-stage grant opportunities.
Designed and implemented a unified knowledge management system for R&D and operations.
myContribution: Strategic intern reporting directly to the Founder, acting as bridge between internal operations and external investor/grant outreach.
result: Secured mapping of 10+ viable grand opportunities and implemented an internal workflow framework that scaled the startup's team coordination efficiency.
